reinforced_leather_armor.name: Reinforced Leather Armor
reinforced_leather_armor.desc: Armor reinforced with thick hide. +2 Physical Defence, +1 Speed.

claw_gauntlets.name: Claw Gauntlets
claw_gauntlets.desc: Gauntlets with embedded claws. +2 Strength, +1 Speed. Damage: 1d4. Causes bleeding.

bone_buckler.name: Bone Buckler
bone_buckler.desc: Small off-hand shield from monster bones. +1 Physical Defence, +2 Speed. Bonus to parrying. GRANTS: Parry Bonus.

beast_hide_boots.name: Beast Hide Boots
beast_hide_boots.desc: Boots crafted from tough monster hide. +2 Speed, +1 HP. Move silently. GRANTS: Silent Movement.

fang_dagger.name: Fang Dagger
fang_dagger.desc: Sharp dagger made from monster fangs. +1 Strength, +2 Speed. Damage: 1d4. High piercing damage.

fang_parry_dagger.name: Fang Parry Dagger
fang_parry_dagger.desc: Light fang dagger built for parrying. +2 Speed, +1 Physical Defence. Damage: 1d4. Equip off-hand with Dual Wield. GRANTS: Parry Bonus, Piercing.

bone_club.name: Bone Club
bone_club.desc: Heavy club made from dense monster bones. +3 Strength. Damage: 1d6. Crushing attacks.

living_stone_armor.name: Living Stone Armor
living_stone_armor.desc: Armor that adapts like living rock. +4 Physical Defence, +2 HP. Reduces incoming damage. GRANTS: Damage Reduction.

iron_round_shield.name: Iron Round Shield
iron_round_shield.desc: Iron buckler with a reinforced rim. +2 Physical Defence, +1 Speed. Bonus to parrying. 1 enchant slot. GRANTS: Parry Bonus.

spiked_targe.name: Spiked Targe
spiked_targe.desc: A spiked strapped shield for brawlers. +3 Physical Defence, +1 Strength. 1 enchant slot. GRANTS: Piercing.

razor_talon_daggers.name: Razor Talon Daggers
razor_talon_daggers.desc: Twin daggers that pierce armor. +3 Speed, +2 Strength. Damage: 1d8. Armor piercing with critical bleeding. GRANTS: Critical Bleeding, Armor Pierce.

drake_scale_mail.name: Drake Scale Mail
drake_scale_mail.desc: Armor made from drake scales. +4 Physical Defence, +2 Magical Defence, -1 Speed. Fire resistance.

venom_blade.name: Venom Blade
venom_blade.desc: Blade infused with poison sacs. +3 Strength, +2 Speed. Damage: 1d8. Poison and armor piercing.

crystal_hammer.name: Crystal Hammer
crystal_hammer.desc: Heavy hammer with crystal head. +4 Strength, +2 Magic Power. Damage: 1d8. Stunning blows deal magic damage.

segmented_carapace_armor.name: Segmented Carapace Armor
segmented_carapace_armor.desc: Flexible armor that prevents critical hits. +6 Physical Defence, +3 HP, +1 Speed. GRANTS: Critical Immunity, Flexible Defense.

void_steel_blade.name: Void Steel Blade
void_steel_blade.desc: Blade forged from void essence. +5 Strength, +3 Speed, +2 Magic Power. Damage: 1d10. Void damage with life steal. GRANTS: Void Damage, Life Steal, Armor Piercing.

guardian_shield.name: Guardian Shield
guardian_shield.desc: Shield that reflects attacks. +5 Physical Defence, +3 Magical Defence, +2 HP. Reflects damage and blocks magic. GRANTS: Reflect Damage, Magic Barrier.

mirror_scale_buckler.name: Mirror-Scale Buckler
mirror_scale_buckler.desc: Buckler faced with reflective monster scales. +3 Physical Defence, +2 Magical Defence, +1 Speed. 2 enchant slots. GRANTS: Reflect Damage.

phoenix_regeneration_armor.name: Phoenix Regeneration Armor
phoenix_regeneration_armor.desc: Legendary armor that regenerates the wearer. +8 Physical Defence, +5 HP, +2 Strength. Auto-healing. GRANTS: Auto Healing, Damage Reduction, Critical Immunity.

titan_wall_shield.name: Titan Wall Shield
titan_wall_shield.desc: A slab shield forged from titan bone and void steel. +5 Physical Defence, +2 Magical Defence, +2 HP. 2 enchant slots. GRANTS: Damage Reduction, Magic Barrier.

dragonheart_sword.name: Dragonheart Sword
dragonheart_sword.desc: Legendary sword containing a dragon's heart. +6 Strength, +4 Speed, +3 Magic Power. Damage: 2d10. Dragon fire attacks. GRANTS: Dragon Fire, Critical Strikes, Energy Waves.

titan_plate_armor.name: Titan Plate Armor
titan_plate_armor.desc: Armor of the ancient titans. +10 Physical Defence, +5 Magical Defence, +3 Strength, +4 HP. Grants titan-like power. GRANTS: Immovable, Damage Immunity, Titan Strength.

healing_salve.name: Healing Salve
healing_salve.desc: A basic healing remedy. Restores 15 HP.

antitoxin_draught.name: Antitoxin Draught
antitoxin_draught.desc: Neutralizes poison effects. Cures poison and provides immunity for 5 rounds.

beast_repellent.name: Beast Repellent
beast_repellent.desc: Makes you less likely to be detected by monsters for 10 rounds.

minor_magic_elixir.name: Minor Magic Elixir
minor_magic_elixir.desc: Increases Magic Power by 3 for 5 rounds.

alchemists_censer.name: Alchemist's Censer
alchemists_censer.desc: Incense censer infused with purifying reagents. +2 Magic Power, +1 Magical Defence. 1 enchant slot. GRANTS: Plague Ward.

berserker_elixir.name: Berserker Elixir
berserker_elixir.desc: Increases Strength by 5 and Speed by 3 for 5 rounds.

frost_shield_potion.name: Frost Shield Potion
frost_shield_potion.desc: Creates a magical barrier that absorbs 30 damage for 8 rounds.

giant_strength_serum.name: Giant Strength Serum
giant_strength_serum.desc: Grants the strength of giants. +7 Strength and +15 HP for 7 rounds.

shadow_step_elixir.name: Shadow Step Elixir
shadow_step_elixir.desc: Enhances speed and allows brief phasing through enemies. +6 Speed for 5 rounds.

regeneration_elixir.name: Regeneration Elixir
regeneration_elixir.desc: Regenerates 5 HP every round for 10 rounds.

void_walker_serum.name: Void Walker Serum
void_walker_serum.desc: Grants void walking abilities. +8 Magic Power, +5 Speed for 8 rounds. Can phase through dimensions.

dragon_blood_elixir.name: Dragon Blood Elixir
dragon_blood_elixir.desc: Infuses drinker with dragon essence. +8 Strength, +5 Physical Defence, +5 Magical Defence for 10 rounds.

phoenix_rebirth_elixir.name: Phoenix Rebirth Elixir
phoenix_rebirth_elixir.desc: Legendary elixir that fully restores all stats and grants temporary invulnerability.

immortality_essence.name: Immortality Essence
immortality_essence.desc: The ultimate alchemical creation. +50 HP, +50 Stamina, +10 Magic Power. Immunity to death for 15 rounds.

weapon_sharpening_stone.name: Weapon Sharpening Stone
weapon_sharpening_stone.desc: +2 weapon damage while attached. Remove to regain the item.

armor_ward_charm.name: Armor Ward Charm
armor_ward_charm.desc: +3 Magical Defence on armour while attached. Remove to regain the item.

speed_enhancement_rune.name: Speed Enhancement Rune
speed_enhancement_rune.desc: +2 Speed while attached. Remove to regain the item.

strength_blessing_stone.name: Strength Blessing Stone
strength_blessing_stone.desc: +3 Strength while attached. Remove to regain the item.

primer_of_runes.name: Primer of Runes
primer_of_runes.desc: Beginner rune primer bound for travel. +1 Magic Power, +1 Magical Defence.

spellwoven_grimoire.name: Spellwoven Grimoire
spellwoven_grimoire.desc: Spellbook bound with rune-thread. +2 Magic Power, +1 Magical Defence. 1 enchant slot.

elemental_weapon_crystal.name: Elemental Weapon Crystal
elemental_weapon_crystal.desc: Random elemental damage on weapon hits while attached. Remove to regain the item.

rune_etched_buckler.name: Rune-Etched Buckler
rune_etched_buckler.desc: Small shield inlaid with warding runes. +2 Physical Defence, +1 Magical Defence. Blocks stray magic. 1 enchant slot. GRANTS: Magic Barrier.

barrier_crystal.name: Barrier Crystal
barrier_crystal.desc: Advanced ward (Ward Scribe). One 40-point pool soaks magical damage only — not physical, not healing. Track with −1/−5 on the chip; at 0 the crystal is spent. Remove unused to regain the item; if removed after any absorption, the crystal is destroyed.

soul_enhancement_gem.name: Soul Enhancement Gem
soul_enhancement_gem.desc: +20 HP, +20 Stamina, +4 Magic Power while attached. Remove to regain the item.

phase_walker_amulet.name: Phase Walker Amulet
phase_walker_amulet.desc: +5 Speed while attached. Table: brief phasing through walls. Remove to regain the item.

spell_amplifier_orb.name: Spell Amplifier Orb
spell_amplifier_orb.desc: +25% spell power while attached. Remove to regain the item.

bound_archmage_folio.name: Bound Archmage Folio
bound_archmage_folio.desc: Soul-bound spell folio for battle mages. +4 Magic Power, +2 Magical Defence. 2 enchant slots. GRANTS: Concentration.

reality_anchor.name: Reality Anchor
reality_anchor.desc: +8 Physical and Magical Defence while attached. Table: status immunity. Remove to regain the item.

ascension_sigil.name: Ascension Sigil
ascension_sigil.desc: +6 Strength, Speed, and Magic Power while attached. Remove to regain the item.

transcendence_gem.name: Transcendence Gem
transcendence_gem.desc: +2 to all stats while attached. Remove to regain the item.

void_lattice_focus.name: Void Lattice Focus
void_lattice_focus.desc: A lattice of void crystals that channels raw spell energy. +4 Magic Power, +3 Speed, +2 Magical Defence. 2 enchant slots.

godslayer_rune.name: Godslayer Rune
godslayer_rune.desc: +5 Strength and Magic Power while attached. Table: divine damage on hits. Remove to regain the item.

infinity_core.name: Infinity Core
infinity_core.desc: +25 HP and Stamina, +3 defences while attached. Remove to regain the item.

monster_jerky.name: Monster Jerky
monster_jerky.desc: Dried monster meat. +2 HP for 10 rounds.

pot_lid_buckler.name: Pot-Lid Buckler
pot_lid_buckler.desc: When the camp is attacked, anything is a shield. +1 Physical Defence.

kettle_drum.name: Kettle Drum
kettle_drum.desc: An upturned kettle that somehow keeps a beat. +1 Stamina, +1 HP. Vocals work without it — hover for Musician song bonuses.

claw_soup.name: Claw Soup
claw_soup.desc: Hearty soup made from claws. +2 Strength, +1 Speed for 40 rounds.

energy_steaks.name: Energy Steaks
energy_steaks.desc: Grilled monster steaks that restore energy. +15 Stamina for 10 rounds.

hunter_bread.name: Hunter's Bread
hunter_bread.desc: Nutritious bread for long hunts. +3 Speed, +10 Stamina for 45 rounds.

defensive_stew.name: Defensive Stew
defensive_stew.desc: Hearty stew that toughens the body. +2 Physical Defence, +5 HP for 10 rounds.

regenerative_stew.name: Regenerative Stew
regenerative_stew.desc: Stew that promotes healing. Regenerates 3 HP every round for 30 rounds.

spiced_fire_roast.name: Spiced Fire Roast
spiced_fire_roast.desc: Fiery roast with exotic spices. +4 Strength, +2 HP for 40 rounds.

honey_glazed_treats.name: Honey Glazed Treats
honey_glazed_treats.desc: Sweet treats that sharpen reflexes. +3 Speed, +2 Magic Power for 10 rounds.

crystal_meat_pie.name: Crystal Meat Pie
crystal_meat_pie.desc: Pie infused with crystal essence. +5 Magic Power, +3 Magical Defence for 10 rounds.

warrior_feast.name: Warrior's Feast
warrior_feast.desc: Massive feast for warriors. +6 Strength, +4 Physical Defence for 45 rounds.

swift_hunter_meal.name: Swift Hunter Meal
swift_hunter_meal.desc: Light meal for agile hunters. +5 Speed, +20 Stamina for 10 rounds.

elemental_feast.name: Elemental Feast
elemental_feast.desc: A feast providing resistance to all elements. 30% elemental resistance for 20 rounds.

dragon_scale_casserole.name: Dragon Scale Casserole
dragon_scale_casserole.desc: Casserole that grants dragon-like resilience. +8 Strength, +6 Physical Defence, +4 Magical Defence for 80 rounds.

void_essence_broth.name: Void Essence Broth
void_essence_broth.desc: Mysterious broth from the void. +10 Magic Power, +6 Speed, allows brief phasing for 10 rounds.

phoenix_banquet.name: Phoenix Banquet
phoenix_banquet.desc: Legendary feast. +5 to all stats for 40 rounds.

ancient_coin.name: Ancient Coin
ancient_coin.desc: An old coin of unknown origin. Increases gold drops by 10%.

bone_relic.name: Bone Relic
bone_relic.desc: Ancient bone carved with protective runes. 25% resistance to undead attacks.

carved_war_drum.name: Carved War Drum
carved_war_drum.desc: Ancient drum restored for battle songs. +1 Stamina, +1 Magic Power. Vocals work without it — hover for Musician song bonuses.

temple_bell_chimes.name: Temple Bell Chimes
temple_bell_chimes.desc: Ancient temple bells restrung for the road. +2 Stamina, +1 Magical Defence. 1 enchant slot. Vocals work without them — hover for Musician song bonuses.

forgotten_map.name: Forgotten Map
forgotten_map.desc: Ancient map revealing hidden paths. +15% chance to discover new areas.

warriors_charm.name: Warrior's Charm
warriors_charm.desc: Ancient charm worn by warriors. +2 Strength, +1 Physical Defence for 10 rounds.

mystic_amulet.name: Mystic Amulet
mystic_amulet.desc: Ancient amulet of forgotten mages. +3 Magic Power, +1 Magical Defence for 10 rounds.

elemental_tablet.name: Elemental Tablet
elemental_tablet.desc: Ancient tablet revealing elemental secrets. Unlocks Elemental Mastery knowledge.

restored_glyph_codex.name: Restored Glyph Codex
restored_glyph_codex.desc: Recovered glyphs rebound into a travel codex. +3 Magic Power, +1 Accuracy. 1 enchant slot.

crystal_resonator.name: Crystal Resonator
crystal_resonator.desc: Ancient crystal that resonates with magical energy. +6 Magic Power, +3 Speed, enhanced mana regeneration for 80 rounds.

shadow_walker_mask.name: Shadow Walker Mask
shadow_walker_mask.desc: Mask of ancient assassins. +5 Speed, grants stealth and shadow step abilities for 10 rounds.

titans_legacy.name: Titan's Legacy
titans_legacy.desc: Relic of the ancient titans. +7 Strength, +15 HP, grants titan-like power for 10 rounds.

ancient_compass.name: Ancient Compass
ancient_compass.desc: Mystical compass that points to hidden treasures. +25% chance to find rare items.

scholar_spectacles.name: Scholar's Spectacles
scholar_spectacles.desc: Ancient spectacles that enhance learning. +30% experience gain for 20 rounds.

time_worn_artifact.name: Time-Worn Artifact
time_worn_artifact.desc: Ancient artifact that accelerates learning. +25% experience gain for 20 rounds.

dimensional_anchor.name: Dimensional Anchor
dimensional_anchor.desc: Ancient device that locks reality. +8 Physical/Magical Defence, prevents dimensional interference for 90 rounds.

sanctified_reliquary.name: Sanctified Reliquary
sanctified_reliquary.desc: Recovered reliquary re-consecrated for travel. +2 Magical Defence, +2 HP. 1 enchant slot. GRANTS: Holy Symbol Craft, Turn Unholy.

phoenix_crown.name: Phoenix Crown
phoenix_crown.desc: Crown of an ancient phoenix king. +30 HP, +8 Magic Power, fire immunity and regeneration for 20 rounds.

primordial_codex.name: Primordial Codex
primordial_codex.desc: The legendary codex of the first civilization. Unlocks ancient magic and time manipulation.

genesis_fragment.name: Genesis Fragment
genesis_fragment.desc: Fragment from the world's creation. Permanently increases HP/Stamina by 20, all other stats by 3. One use per character.

omniscience_tablet.name: Omniscience Tablet
omniscience_tablet.desc: The ultimate archaeological discovery. Unlocks all knowledge skills and universal mastery.

spirit_rattle.name: Spirit Rattle
spirit_rattle.desc: Dried gourds and seeds on a stick — surprisingly catchy. +1 Stamina, +1 HP. Vocals work without it — hover for Musician song bonuses.

mana_moss.name: Mana Moss
mana_moss.desc: Moss that restores magical energy. Restores 15 MP.

energy_berries.name: Energy Berries
energy_berries.desc: Sweet berries that restore energy. Restores 20 Stamina.

swift_leaf_tea.name: Swift Leaf Tea
swift_leaf_tea.desc: Tea made from swift-growing leaves. +2 Speed for 30 rounds.

protective_bark.name: Protective Bark
protective_bark.desc: Tough bark that provides protection. +2 Physical Defence, +5 HP for 40 rounds.

vitality_bloom.name: Vitality Bloom
vitality_bloom.desc: Rare flower that boosts vitality. +3 HP, +2 Strength for 30 rounds.

forest_guardian_tea.name: Forest Guardian Tea
forest_guardian_tea.desc: Tea blessed by forest spirits. +30% nature magic effectiveness for 10 rounds.

herbal_antidote.name: Herbal Antidote
herbal_antidote.desc: Powerful antidote that cures all poisons and grants immunity for 30 rounds.

dragons_breath_flower.name: Dragon's Breath Flower
dragons_breath_flower.desc: Fiery flower that burns with inner flame. +6 Magic Power, +3 Strength, enhances fire magic for 10 rounds.

moonlight_lotus.name: Moonlight Lotus
moonlight_lotus.desc: Lotus that blooms only in moonlight. +5 Magical Defence, +4 Speed, grants night vision for 80 rounds.

giants_root.name: Giant's Root
giants_root.desc: Massive root that grants giant-like strength. +5 Strength, +20 HP for 10 rounds.

ethereal_mushroom.name: Ethereal Mushroom
ethereal_mushroom.desc: Ghostly mushroom from another realm. +6 Speed, allows phasing and spirit sight for 40 rounds.

nature_elixir.name: Nature's Elixir
nature_elixir.desc: Pure essence of nature. Fully heals and removes all negative effects.

phoenix_bloom.name: Phoenix Bloom
phoenix_bloom.desc: Flower reborn from phoenix ashes. +40 HP, +8 Magic Power, auto-resurrection on death for 20 rounds.

void_spore.name: Void Spore
void_spore.desc: Spore from the void realm. +10 Magic Power, +7 Speed, grants void magic and dimension stepping for 90 rounds.

world_tree_seed.name: World Tree Seed
world_tree_seed.desc: Seed from the legendary World Tree. Permanently increases all stats by 3.

cosmic_essence_fruit.name: Cosmic Essence Fruit
cosmic_essence_fruit.desc: Fruit that contains the essence of the cosmos. Permanently increases HP/Stamina by 30, defences and Magic Power by 5. One use per character.
